description: A staff member wants to request vacation time using the HR portal.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and check their available vacation leave balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the employee has enough accrued time for their request.

nodes.task_description: Guide the employee on how to submit a time-off request in the HR system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent walks the employee through the submission form.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the request is now pending approval from their direct manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the next step in the workflow.
